headline: Essex Property Trust (ESS) Stock Sees Modest Fair Value Lift As Analysts Raise Targets
summary: Essex Property Trust is back in focus after several firms lifted their price targets into the high US$200s and low US$300s, with one move taking the target up to US$320. These changes reflect fresh analyst commentary around West Coast rental demand, Bay Area exposure tied to artificial intelligence related activity, and ongoing interest in the stock as a residential REIT with a long dividend track record. Read on to see what is driving this evolving narrative and how you can keep up with the...

headline: Essex Property Trust (ESS) Heads Into Earnings On A Fairly Valued Narrative
summary: Essex Property Trust (ESS) is set to report its second quarter 2026 results after the market closes on July 29, with expectations centered on a slightly softer funds from operations figure. See our latest analysis for Essex Property Trust. At a share price of $292.79, Essex Property Trust has seen a 4.05% 1 month share price return and an 18.06% 3 month share price return. The 1 year total shareholder return of 6.43% contrasts with a 34.89% total shareholder return over three years,...
